entry.data:
MOSTLY SUNNY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 60S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, DIMINISHING TO AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
